title: Euler Critical Buckling Load with Effective Length Factor
content: Real column end conditions are modelled with effective length factor K: Pcr = π²EI/(KL)². K=0.5 (fixed-fixed), K=0.7 (fixed-pinned), K=1.0 (pin-pin), K=2.0 (cantilever). A design safety factor ≥ 3 is recommended for temporary construction columns. Monitoring axial strain with micro-strain gauges allows real-time tracking of the load-to-buckling ratio during construction loading.
